evals.prompt: Change the button color from blue to red on the landing page
evals.expected_reason: This is a simple visual tweak. All agents should have >= 8/10 confidence and low risk.
evals.risk_check: No security, architecture, or test concerns

evals.prompt: Reposition the login button to be centered instead of right-aligned
evals.expected_reason: Positioning change only. No logic changes.

evals.prompt: Build me a login page with email/password authentication, forgot password flow, and remember me option
evals.expected_reason: Whole new page with auth logic. Security agent should flag medium/high risk.
evals.risk_check: Security: auth boundaries, input validation; Eng: new infrastructure

evals.prompt: Add payment processing with Stripe. Create checkout page, webhook handler, and payment history page.
evals.expected_reason: Payment processing = high risk by definition. Security agent MUST flag high risk.
evals.risk_check: Security: payment handling, webhook security, PII; Eng: new services

evals.expected_reason: Security vulnerability: user_id in query string can be tampered. Security agent should find this.
evals.risk_check: Security: auth bypass vulnerability; Eng: architectural issue

evals.prompt: I want to understand what users are doing on my site. Add analytics: page views, button clicks, time on page, and a dashboard to view the data.
evals.expected_reason: Whole new system with dashboard page, data model, and tracking infrastructure.
evals.risk_check: Eng: new infrastructure, data model; QA: new test paths

evals.prompt: Fix the typo on the pricing page: '99$ per month' should be '$99 per month'
evals.expected_reason: Text correction only. No logic, styling, or infrastructure changes.
evals.risk_check: None. This should pass all 4 reviews with 10/10 confidence.
